creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
Link against libexecinfo, if installed.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-configure

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

--- zabbix-server-1.8.3,2.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zabbix-server/files/patch-configure /root/portwork/zabbix/net-mgmt/zabbix-server/files/patch-configure
--- /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zabbix-server/files/patch-configure	1969-12-31 18:00:00.000000000 -0600
+++ /root/portwork/zabbix/net-mgmt/zabbix-server/files/patch-configure	2010-09-13 07:33:07.000000000 -0500
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+--- configure.orig	2010-09-13 07:24:08.000000000 -0500
++++ configure	2010-09-13 07:32:43.000000000 -0500
+@@ -9277,7 +9277,7 @@
+ { echo "$as_me:$LINENO: checking for -rdynamic linking option" >&5
+ echo $ECHO_N "checking for -rdynamic linking option... $ECHO_C" >&6; }
+ saved_LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS"
+-LDFLAGS="-rdynamic"
++LDFLAGS="-rdynamic -lexecinfo"
+ cat >conftest.$ac_ext <<_ACEOF
+ /* confdefs.h.  */
+ _ACEOF
+@@ -9313,7 +9313,7 @@
+ 	 test ! -s conftest.err
+        } && test -s conftest$ac_exeext &&
+        $as_test_x conftest$ac_exeext; then
+-  LDFLAGS="$saved_LDFLAGS -rdynamic"
++  LDFLAGS="$saved_LDFLAGS -rdynamic -lexecinfo"
+ { echo "$as_me:$LINENO: result: yes" >&5
+ echo "${ECHO_T}yes" >&6; }
+ else
--- zabbix-server-1.8.3,2.patch ends here ---
